MatchState.terrain.surface.heights.length must equal MatchState.terrain.surface.sampleCount (default 512) after generation and after every deformation.
MatchState.terrain.surface.metrics must report variationScore >= 0.15 and have ridgeCount, valleyCount, and flatPocketCount all >= 1 to guarantee visible variety at match start.
Each entry in MatchState.terrain.surface.spawnSlots must maintain |slope| <= 0.2 and be marked occupiedBy only by addPlayer; no two players share the same slot.
applyCrater() may only mutate heights within the computed impact radius and must keep every height within [groundMin, groundMax] bounds.
TerrainSurface.version increments by exactly one per deformation and is included in publicState so replay hashes can enforce determinism.
Terrain generation plus first turn setup must complete within the performance budget (e.g., <5ms for buildTerrain, <10ms for fire-command crater) as recorded in MatchStore latency telemetry.
